name: Write-path integrity
intent: No silently-wrong edge, no unwritable correction. Members: TASK-027 (FGAP-007 edge-direction guard), FGAP-093 (dangling/unregistered endpoint guard), FGAP-091 (warranted-edge forcing function — mechanism fork open), FGAP-085 (field deletion through update-block-item). Lane B: parallel with the Lane A spine from the start (edge-write region of context-sdk; soft-only overlap).
goal: append-relation rejects mis-directed and dangling edges at write time; field deletion has a sanctioned path.
